= not_null

Ensures a value is not null.


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.a = this.a.not_null()

# In:  {"a":"foobar","b":"barbaz"}
# Out: {"a":"foobar"}

# In:  {"b":"barbaz"}
# Out: Error("failed assignment (line 1): field `this.a`: value is null")
----
